desc: Build a bootarg-gated Alpine RAM-root auto-reporter for ticket 074's exact observation-only HID trace image. When t6040.hid_trace_auto=1 is present, after the existing pseudo-filesystem setup and a bounded delay, automatically emit only Alpine release/architecture, bounded HIDTRACE lines, every readable dc_trace/hid_trace file, /proc/bus/input/devices, /dev/input inventory, and /proc/partitions over ttydc0 TX. It must require no inbound shell command and add no modules, storage mounts, network, probing, new MMIO, or kernel control-flow changes. Rebuild and hash only the initramfs, host-test syntax/output where possible, document evidence, and stop before any rig proposal pending independent review.
author: codex
